title: Add Playwright-based browser automation tool
goal: Playwright 기반의 실제 브라우저 자동화 도구를 추가한다. headless Chrome으로 페이지 이동, 텍스트 추출, 클릭, 입력, 스크린샷 등의 action을 수행할 수 있다.

test_requirements.expected: returns {success: true, data: {text: ...}} with page text content

test_requirements.case: type action with selector and text

constraints: Use playwright async API (from playwright.async_api import async_playwright)
Default to headless=True, but allow headless=False via params
Each run() call should create and close a fresh browser context (no session leaking)
Do not modify existing browser or crawler tools
Screenshots saved to /tmp with unique filename
Return text content truncated to 10000 chars max
If playwright is not installed, return {success: false, error: 'playwright not installed'}
test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
